title: helichrysum viguieri
intro: Helichrysum viguieri, also known as the Corsican or Italian strawflower, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It possesses medicinal properties due to its essential oils, which contain compounds such as borneol, bornyl acetate, and camphor. The plant's health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce pain, and combat infections. Helichrysum viguieri can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to promote overall well-being.
